chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR C. P. No. D – 1330 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Hearing of case 1. For orders on office objections at Flag-A 2. For hearing of main case 13.12.2023 Mr. Yassa Ali Mahar, Advocate for petitioner. Mr. Ghulam Abbas Kubar, Assistant Advocate General Sindh..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Case of the petitioner is that he was appointed on contract basis as Helper in Sukkur Municipal Corporation, Sukkur in 2010, and still rendering his services, but despite his request, he has not been regularized. Mr. Khuda Bux Chohan, Advocate has appeared on behalf of Sukkur Municipal Corporation, and submits that if petitioner files an appropriate application for the relief he is seeking through this petition, it will be considered and decided, subject to all exceptions, in accordance with law. Counsel for the petitioner has accepted the proposal, and this petition is accordingly disposed of. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
